chunks.title: The Golden Calf
chunks.reason: Narrative of the people's idolatry and Aaron's role in making the calf.

chunks.title: God's Anger and Moses' Intercession
chunks.reason: Divine declaration of judgment followed by Moses' persuasive prayer.

chunks.title: Moses Descends and Breaks the Tablets
chunks.reason: Physical descent, Joshua's report, and Moses' destruction of the idol.

chunks.title: Confrontation with Aaron and Levite Judgment
chunks.reason: Moses questions Aaron, followed by the call to arms and execution of judgment.

chunks.title: Moses' Second Intercession and Final Verdict
chunks.reason: Moses offers to be blotted out for the people and receives God's final instruction.
